name: support_catalog_bad
note: A sprawling catalog. Intents overlap across tools, dangerous tools are ungated, and a coarse manage_order tool bundles a benign lookup with cancel and refund. The agent has no obvious choice for a read, and a destructive action can run with no authorization, no confirmation, and no escalation.

tools.name: manage_order
tools.description: Manage an order: look it up, cancel it, or issue a refund.

tools.name: lookup
tools.description: General lookup for orders and accounts.

tools.name: account_tool
tools.description: View an account or close it.
